texto: Are you sure you've never dated girls before? You're awfully good at this." Hunter's gaze returned to me. I could see some of that hated anger still in her eyes. "Kissing?"I couldn't help laughing. "That, top. But I meant facing off against the Purity Crusader over there," I clarified. "I've been with women who were too afraid to even hold my hand in public."I don't see it as a big deal," Hunter replied. "It shouldn't matter if a person is straight or gay or something in between. If I want to show i care about someone, I shouldn't have to hide it.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Eliza Lentzski que provoca limites e escolhas conscientes. Ao questionar “Are you sure you've never dated girls before? You're awfully good at this." Hunter's gaze returne…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre amor, bigotry, lesbians, com foco em lesbians e love.
